app.name: PDF Doctor
app.description: Free online PDF tools to merge, split, compress, convert, edit, sign, and protect your PDFs.

hero.title: Every PDF Tool You'll Ever Need
hero.subtitle: Merge, split, compress, convert, edit, and sign PDFs — all in one place. Free, fast, and secure.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by thousands of users across India

mergePdf.name: Merge PDF
mergePdf.longDescription: Merge multiple PDF files into a single document. Drag and drop to reorder pages before combining.

splitPdf.name: Split PDF
splitPdf.longDescription: Extract specific pages or split your PDF into individual files. Choose custom page ranges.

rotatePdf.name: Rotate PDF
rotatePdf.longDescription: Rotate individual pages or all pages at once. Add pages from other PDFs. Visual workspace with instant preview.

compressPdf.name: Compress PDF
compressPdf.longDescription: Compress your PDF files without losing quality. Perfect for email attachments and uploads.

pdfToWord.name: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.longDescription: Convert PDF to editable Word (.docx) with real text, headings, bullet lists, and tables you can edit in Microsoft Word or Google Docs.

wordToPdf.name: Word to PDF
wordToPdf.longDescription: Convert your Word documents (.doc, .docx) to PDF format with perfect formatting.

jpgToPdf.name: JPG to PDF
jpgToPdf.longDescription: Convert JPG, PNG, and other image formats to PDF. Combine multiple images into one PDF.

editPdf.name: Edit PDF
editPdf.longDescription: Edit your PDFs online — add text, images, shapes, highlights, and annotations.

signPdf.name: Sign PDF
signPdf.longDescription: Sign your PDF documents digitally. Draw, type, or upload your signature.

aiPdfSummarizer.name: AI PDF Summarizer
aiPdfSummarizer.longDescription: Use AI to get instant summaries, key points, and insights from your PDF documents.

pdfScanner.name: PDF Scanner
pdfScanner.longDescription: Convert scanned images and photos of documents into clean, searchable PDFs.

unlockPdf.name: Unlock PDF
unlockPdf.longDescription: Remove password protection from your PDF files. You must know the password to unlock.

protectPdf.name: Protect PDF
protectPdf.longDescription: Secure your PDF files with password protection. Set permissions for printing and editing.

pdfToExcel.name: PDF to Excel
pdfToExcel.longDescription: Extract text and tables from PDF into an editable Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheet.

pdfToPpt.name: PDF to PowerPoint
pdfToPpt.longDescription: Turn PDF pages into an editable PowerPoint (.pptx) presentation.

excelToPdf.name: Excel to PDF
excelToPdf.longDescription: Convert Excel (.xls, .xlsx) files to PDF with table layout preserved.

pptToPdf.name: PowerPoint to PDF
pptToPdf.longDescription: Convert PowerPoint (.ppt, .pptx) presentations to PDF format.

addWatermark.name: Add Watermark
addWatermark.longDescription: Stamp a text or image watermark on every page of your PDF document.

toolPage.proFeatureDescription: This tool requires a Pro subscription.

toolPage.passwordHint: Enter the password for this PDF

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I use PDF Doctor for free?
faq.a1: Yes! Our basic tools are free to use with a limit of 5 uses per day. There is no file size limit — upload PDFs of any size. No signup required for most tools.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: We accept all major payment methods through Razorpay — credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and wallets.
faq.q3: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel your Pro subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
faq.a4: Absolutely. All files are encrypted during transfer and automatically deleted within 2 hours of processing. We never access or share your files.
faq.a5: We offer a full refund within 7 days of purchase if you're not satisfied with the Pro plan.

privacy.title: 100% Secure & Private
privacy.description: Your files are encrypted during transfer and automatically deleted after processing. We never access, share, or store your documents.

footer.description: PDF Doctor is a free online PDF toolkit. Merge, split, compress, convert, edit, sign, and protect your PDFs — all from your browser.

seo.homeTitle: PDF Doctor — Free Online PDF Tools | Merge, Split, Compress, Convert
seo.homeDescription: Free online PDF tools to merge, split, compress, convert, edit, sign, and protect your PDFs. No signup required. Fast, secure, and easy to use.
seo.pricingTitle: Pricing — PDF Doctor | Affordable PDF Tool Plans
seo.pricingDescription: Choose the right plan for your PDF needs. Start free with basic tools or upgrade to Pro for unlimited access, AI features, and more.

features.title: Why Choose PDF Doctor?
features.subtitle: The simplest way to handle all your PDF tasks

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Process your PDFs in seconds, not minutes. Our optimized pipeline handles files quickly.

secure.title: Bank-Level Security
secure.description: 256-bit SSL encryption. Files are auto-deleted after processing. Your data stays private.

easy.title: Dead Simple
easy.description: No software to install. Just upload, process, and download. Works on any device.

free.title: Free to Use
free.description: Most tools are completely free. No hidden charges, no credit card required.

ai.title: AI-Powered
ai.description: Our Pro plan includes AI features like PDF summarization powered by advanced language models.

allInOne.title: All-in-One Toolkit
allInOne.description: 12+ PDF tools in one place. No need to switch between different websites.

convertPage.title: Convert PDF Files
convertPage.description: Convert documents to and from PDF — free, fast, and secure. Pick a tool below to get started.
convertPage.ctaDesc: Browse merge, compress, sign, AI, and more on our full tools directory.

allTools.pageDesc: Browse every PDF tool — merge, split, compress, convert, edit, sign, protect, and more. Filter by category and start in seconds.
allTools.hint: Use filters to find the right tool, or browse all at once.
allTools.ctaDesc: Explore featured tools and start your PDF workflow.

landing.heroBadge: Free PDF tools · No install needed
landing.heroSubtitle: Merge, split, compress, convert, scan, sign, protect, unlock, and summarize PDFs — all in your browser with a fast, secure workflow.
landing.heroTrust: Free tools available · Files auto-delete after 2 hours
landing.workflowDesc: Three steps from messy documents to polished PDFs — no software to install.
landing.workflowUploadDesc: Drag & drop any PDF, Word, or image file
landing.workflowProcessDesc: Our servers handle merge, convert, or AI in seconds
landing.workflowDownloadDesc: Get your result instantly — files auto-delete later
landing.toolsDesc: Everything you need to work with PDFs — fast, free, and secure.
landing.whyChooseDesc: Trusted by students, professionals, and teams across India — built for speed, privacy, and simplicity.
landing.whyChoose_users_desc: Thousands of users rely on PDF Doctor every day to merge, convert, compress, and manage documents without installing software.
landing.whyChoose_business_desc: From freelancers to small businesses — fast processing, clear pricing, and reliable results for everyday document work.
landing.whyChoose_everywhere_desc: Use PDF Doctor on desktop, tablet, or phone — any modern browser. No downloads, no plugins, no learning curve.
landing.whyChoose_support_desc: Questions about a tool or your account? Reach our support team anytime — we're here to help you finish your PDF tasks.
landing.whyChoose_encryption_desc: Every upload travels over encrypted HTTPS. Your files are processed securely and never shared with third parties.
landing.whyChoose_standards_desc: Auto-delete after 2 hours, no permanent storage, and privacy-first design. Your documents stay yours — always.
landing.aiDesc: Drop any PDF and get an instant, intelligent summary. Our AI reads every page so you don't have to — extracting insights, action items, and key dates in a clean report layout.
landing.securityDesc: We take privacy seriously. Every file is handled securely and never stored longer than necessary.
landing.security1Desc: Files deleted after 2 hours — 24 hours for Pro.
landing.security2Desc: TLS encryption. Your data never exposed in transit.
landing.security3Desc: Delete files anytime before the retention window.
landing.security4Desc: We never keep files beyond the retention window.
landing.pricingDesc: Get started for free. Upgrade when you need more.
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of users who trust PDF Doctor for all their PDF needs — no signup required.
landing.faq1a: Upload your PDF file, choose the tool you need, and let PDF Doctor handle the rest. All processing happens securely on our servers, and your files are automatically deleted after 2 hours.
landing.faq2a: Yes! PDF Doctor offers a generous free tier with 5 tool uses per day and no file size limit. For power users, our Pro plan unlocks more daily uses, AI tools, and priority processing.
landing.faq3a: Absolutely. Files are transmitted over encrypted connections, processed in isolated environments, and automatically deleted after 2 hours (24 hours for Pro users). We never share or sell your data.
landing.faq4q: What is the file size limit?
landing.faq4a: There is no file size limit — upload PDFs of any size on every tool.
landing.faq5q: How does AI PDF Summarizer work?
landing.faq5a: Our AI Summarizer reads your PDF and generates a concise summary with key points, action items, and important dates. It's powered by advanced language models and is available exclusively to Pro users.
landing.faq6a: We accept all major credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and wallets through Razorpay. All transactions are processed securely in INR.
landing.faq7q: Can I cancel my Pro subscription?
landing.faq7a: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your dashboard. You'll continue to have Pro access until the end of your current billing period.
